title: Indian payments chief thinks AI will be heavily involved in next era of digital payment growth
slides: What if AI decides if your payment goes through?
India’s payments chief says AI will guide approvals.
Rules may shift from human oversight to machine logic.
Your failed transaction could be overturned by AI.
Test whether your bank uses AI for payment routing.
thread_text:
1. What if AI decides your payment?

India's payments chief just stated AI will now guide transaction approvals, replacing human judgment.

2. Rules shift to machine logic.

Banks are planning to let AI overturn failed transactions without any human review.

3. Your bank might already use AI.

A simple test can reveal if your payment routing runs through algorithms instead of humans.

4. AI can reverse a decline.

A declined card could get approved seconds later if the AI finds a pattern it trusts.

5. Test your bank this week.

Call customer support and ask: 'Does AI route my payments?' If they hesitate, you have your answer.
video_script: AI may approve or deny your payment.
India's payments chief confirmed this shift.
Rules move from humans to machine logic.
A failed transaction could be overturned automatically.
Test your bank for AI routing today.

script: AI may approve or deny your payment.
India's payments chief confirmed this shift.
Rules move from humans to machine logic.
A failed transaction could be overturned automatically.
Test your bank for AI routing today.

instagram.caption:
India’s payments chief just said AI will guide transaction approvals, replacing human judgment. 💳

Banks can now let AI overturn a failed payment without any human review. One declined card could get approved seconds later if the AI finds a pattern it trusts.

For anyone building or managing digital products: payment decisions may soon be invisible black boxes—your users won’t know why their transaction failed or succeeded.

Call your bank this week and ask: “Does AI route my payments?” If they hesitate, you have your answer. 🔍
